_comment: Per-dataset georeference for the TUMTraf s110 intersection. Read by geo_reference.py via dataset_manager; overrides the module's built-in defaults. The two transforms are lifted verbatim from the TUMTraf dev-kit (hd_map.py map->s110_base, and visualize_point_cloud_with_3d_boxes.py s110_base->cloud).
